# Holo Forensics v0.1.6

## ✨ What's Changed

- Added Windows collection support for Microsoft Protection Logs (`MPLog*.log`) from Microsoft Defender Support.
- Added offline parsing for Microsoft Protection Logs, with JSONL output for collected packages.
- Exposed the new MPLogs coverage in the CLI, desktop workflow, parser catalog, and collection catalog.
- Updated the README and wiki documentation to include the new Microsoft Protection Logs support.

## 🧪 Release Notes

- Compared with [v0.1.5](https://github.com/false00/holoForensics/releases/tag/v0.1.5), this release adds end-to-end support for Microsoft Defender Support MPLogs.
- Holo Forensics can now collect `C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Support\MPLog*.log` from a live system and parse the resulting package directly into JSONL.
- The new MPLogs coverage is available across the desktop workflow, CLI, README coverage tables, and wiki indexes.
